title: asclepias otarioides
intro: Asclepias otarioides, also known as the New Zealand milkweed or Otari milkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asclepias genus, native to New Zealand. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Asclepias otarioides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional herbal medicine.
